Workspaces.title: One Agent. Two Core Workspaces.
Workspaces.description: Choose the brain that powers your business. From physical products to service bookings, GhostAgent handles the heavy lifting.
Workspaces.ecomTitle: Multilingual automated replies & real-time inventory syncing.
Workspaces.ecomDesc: Never sell an out-of-stock item again. GhostAgent checks your live inventory, answers product questions fluently in any language, and checks out customers directly in the DM.
Workspaces.ecomFeature1: Checks live inventory numbers before replying
Workspaces.ecomFeature2: Sends strict checkout links and tracks orders
Workspaces.ecomFeature3: Handles size, color, and shipping inquiries naturally
Workspaces.apptTitle: Smart scheduling and strict calendar management.
Workspaces.apptDesc: Your automated receptionist. GhostAgent books specific service slots, double-checks your calendar availability, and handles strict overlapping appointment logic.
Workspaces.apptFeature1: Smart calendar block checks inside the DM
Workspaces.apptFeature2: Mandatory name & phone capture before booking

Features.label: FEATURES
Features.title: Everything You Need to Scale
Features.description: Automate replies, capture orders, book appointments, and manage customer conversations from one AI-powered workspace.
Features.smartRepliesDesc: GhostAgent understands customer intent, reads context, and replies naturally — from product questions to appointment requests.
Features.multilingualDesc: Reply naturally in English, Arabic, French, Spanish, and mixed-language conversations without breaking flow.
Features.liveSyncDesc: Connect inventory, services, calendar availability, and order data so replies are based on facts — not guesses.
Features.analyticsDesc: Track conversations, captured orders, booked appointments, response times, and automation performance from one dashboard.
Features.autopilotDesc: Answer customers instantly during nights, weekends, holidays, and busy work hours — without losing control.
Features.workflowDesc: GhostAgent can guide customers through checkout, collect required details, check appointment slots, and hand off when a human is needed.

HowItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
HowItWorks.title: Launch GhostAgent in 3 minutes
HowItWorks.description: Connect Instagram, configure your workspace, and start automating replies, orders, and bookings in minutes.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Link your Instagram business account securely with Meta OAuth. No password storage and no complicated setup.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Choose E-Commerce or Appointments, sync your products or services, and define your AI tone and rules.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: GhostAgent starts replying to DMs, checking inventory or availability, and helping convert customers automatically.

Testimonials.title: Trusted by Businesses That Run on DMs
Testimonials.description: From online stores to appointment-based businesses, GhostAgent helps teams reply faster, capture more customers, and stop missing revenue.
Testimonials.proofBar: Automating DMs for e-commerce stores, salons, clinics, studios, and local service businesses.
Testimonials.t1Quote: GhostAgent handles our late-night appointment requests, checks availability, and collects names and phone numbers before confirming. We stopped double-booking clients.
Testimonials.t2Quote: Inventory sync changed everything. Customers ask about size or color, GhostAgent checks stock, replies instantly, and helps complete the order inside the DM.
Testimonials.t3Quote: It switches naturally between Arabic and English, answers service questions, and books clients without me being glued to my phone.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about GhostAgent, automation, and billing.
FAQ.q1: Does GhostAgent handle both physical products and services?
FAQ.a1: Yes. GhostAgent supports both E-Commerce and Service/Appointments workspaces. You can automate product questions, inventory checks, orders, service questions, availability, and bookings.
FAQ.q2: What counts as an AI reply?
FAQ.a2: Each automated message GhostAgent sends to a customer counts as one AI reply. Customer messages and manual replies do not count.
FAQ.q3: Can I use both E-Commerce and Appointments?
FAQ.a3: Yes. Pro and Empire support both workspace types. Starter lets you test one workspace type.
FAQ.a4: GhostAgent checks your working hours, service duration, and calendar availability before asking for required details like name and phone number. It only confirms after the booking is saved.
FAQ.a5: GhostAgent checks your products, variants, stock, and order settings before replying. It can answer product questions, collect customer details, and create orders when everything is valid.
FAQ.q6: Will my account get banned for using a bot?
FAQ.a6: GhostAgent is designed for responsible business automation. You stay in control, can pause autopilot, and can reply manually anytime. Avoid spammy outreach and use it for real customer conversations.
FAQ.q7: Can it speak my local dialect?
FAQ.a7: Yes. GhostAgent can handle English, Arabic, Franco Arabic, French, Spanish, and mixed-language conversations depending on your setup.
FAQ.q8: Can I jump in and reply manually?
FAQ.a8: Yes. You can pause autopilot or manually reply whenever needed. GhostAgent should support your team, not lock you out.
FAQ.a9: Yes. You can start free and upgrade when your DM volume grows.
FAQ.q10: Do I need a credit card to start?
FAQ.a10: No. The Starter plan is free to try.
